 {"id":"bd-66wz.3","title":"bd-66wz subtask: Pointer validation adversarial pipeline tests (free/UAF/canary/foreign)","description":"Background
- The `ValidationPipeline` is the TSM enforcement surface: its outcomes drive Allow/Repair/Deny decisions in libc entrypoints.
- We need direct adversarial regression tests proving the pipeline never returns permissive abstractions for non-live pointers, even when caches and heuristics are involved.

Scope
- Expand unit tests in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs` (and, where appropriate, `arena.rs` / `fingerprint.rs`) to cover adversarial sequences and edge outcomes.
- Prefer testing via `ValidationPipeline::{allocate, free, validate}` instead of reaching into `arena` directly, so the page-oracle/bloom/TLS-cache integration is exercised.

Required Adversarial Cases
1) Foreign pointer validate: returns `Foreign(_)`, and must never claim bounded Valid/Writable remaining-bytes.
2) Foreign free: `ValidationPipeline::free()` must return `FreeResult::ForeignPointer` (and must not crash).
3) Double free: first free => `Freed` (or `FreedWithCanaryCorruption` if provoked); second free => `DoubleFree`.
4) UAF via generation: after free, `validate(addr)` must not yield `CachedValid(_)` and must yield a restrictive outcome (`TemporalViolation` or non-readable).
5) Canary corruption path: corrupt trailing canary; free returns `FreedWithCanaryCorruption`; subsequent validate for addr must remain non-readable/non-writable.
6) Cache interaction: populate TLS cache with a valid pointer; free it; validate again must miss cache and must not return a live abstraction.

Safety/Lattice Assertions
- For each case above, assert `can_read/can_write` matches expectation and that the extracted `PointerAbstraction` state is not `Valid/Writable` for freed/quarantined pointers.

Acceptance
- New tests added to `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs` are deterministic, fast, and produce helpful failure context (case_id, sequence step).
- No new unsafe code outside the existing test intentional-overflow blocks.

Notes
- This bead is test-first: if a test fails, fix the pipeline/arena behavior with the smallest correct change and add a regression assertion.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverLake","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:57:51.973303147Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:05:41.057874399Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T01:05:41.057855244Z","close_reason":"Added ptr validation adversarial tests (foreign/free/doublefree/canary) + stabilized cache-hit assertions","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["allocator","membrane","testing","unit","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66wz.3","depends_on_id":"bd-66wz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1053,"issue_id":"bd-66wz.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented adversarial `ValidationPipeline` tests for free/UAF/canary/foreign and stabilized cache-hit assertions under parallel tests.

Changes
- `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/ptr_validator.rs`:
  - Strengthened foreign-pointer test to assert `ValidationOutcome::Foreign` and `PointerAbstraction` remains `Unknown` with no bounds/generation.
  - Switched allocation/free tests to exercise `ValidationPipeline::{allocate, free}` to cover page-oracle/bloom integration.
  - Added tests: `foreign_free_reported`, `double_free_reported`, `canary_corruption_detected_via_pipeline_free` (with local `#[allow(unsafe_code)]` + `// SAFETY:` comment).
  - Wrapped cache-hit expectations with `lock_tls_cache_epoch_for_tests()` and ensured the lock is dropped before free to avoid deadlock.

Verification
- `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane -- --nocapture` (passes).","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:05:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-66wz.4","title":"bd-66wz subtask: Deterministic property/invariant tests for allocator+membrane state transitions","description":"Background
- Unit tests cover specific sequences; we also need broad invariant pressure over many sequences to catch edge transitions (especially around cache invalidation and quarantine accounting).
- We require determinism (replayable seeds) and short runtime so these can run in CI on every change.

Scope
- Add deterministic property-style tests (no external RNG dependency required) for allocator+membrane state transitions.
- Prefer a tiny local PRNG (e.g. xorshift64*) with fixed seeds so failures are reproducible without environment variables.

Invariant Set (examples; encode as named invariants in assertions)
1) No stale-permissive cache: after any operation that frees an allocation, subsequent `validate(addr)` must not return `CachedValid(_)` for that addr unless a new allocation was performed and revalidated.
2) Quarantine accounting soundness: quarantine_bytes and entry counts never go negative; bounded by max constraints after drain.
3) Temporal safety while tracked: if an allocation has been freed and is still tracked in quarantine/arena, `can_read/can_write` for that addr is false.
4) Determinism: given the same seed and step count, the sequence of operations and observed outcomes is identical.

Test Plan
- Generate N sequences across a small set of fixed seeds.
- Each step randomly chooses: allocate(size), free(ptr), validate(ptr), corrupt_canary(ptr) (guarded by ptr live), etc.
- Track a simple shadow model for expected permissiveness (live vs freed-tracked vs foreign) and assert pipeline outcomes respect it.

Acceptance
- Property/invariant tests live in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane` (module choice: `arena.rs`/`ptr_validator.rs`/new `tests/` module) and run under `cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane`.
- Runtime is bounded and deterministic (<2s total locally).
- On failure, output includes: seed, step index, op, ptr addr, expected class, actual outcome.

Notes
- If adding a crate like `proptest` is considered later, keep this deterministic harness as the baseline (proptest can be an additive layer, not a replacement).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverLake","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:58:27.206444031Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:10:36.404134097Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T01:10:36.404114891Z","close_reason":"Added deterministic invariant sequence property tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["allocator","membrane","property","testing","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66wz.4","depends_on_id":"bd-66wz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1054,"issue_id":"bd-66wz.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented deterministic property/invariant sequence pressure tests without adding external RNG dependencies.

Changes
- Added integration test: `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/tests/allocator_membrane_invariants_sequences_test.rs`
  - Deterministic xorshift64* PRNG with fixed seeds.
  - Runs bounded sequences (alloc/free/validate/double-free) over a small slot pool and asserts core invariants:
    - live pointers validate as `CachedValid`/`Validated` and are readable+writable
    - freed-but-tracked pointers validate as `TemporalViolation` and are not readable+writable
    - second free reports `DoubleFree`
    - foreign pointers validate as `Foreign` with `SafetyState::Unknown` and no claimed bounds
  - Runtime bounded (~0.2s) and failure context includes seed/step/op.

Verification
- `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane -- --nocapture` (unit + integration tests pass).","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:10:36Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-6yd","title":"Crash bundle: deterministic evidence + backtrace capture on failure","description":"Critique mapping: #1 (prove; do not hand-wave).

Deliverables:
- When any smoke/fixture fails, capture:
  - backtrace (RUST_BACKTRACE=1)
  - mode + env vars
  - evidence ledger snapshot (TSM repairs/denials)
  - allocator stats snapshot (arena/quarantine)
  - /proc/self/maps excerpt for pointer provenance debugging

Acceptance:
- Bundle generation is deterministic and bounded (no unbounded logs).
- Bundle is sufficient to reproduce the failure locally.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"2026-02-11 closure (CrimsonCove): crash_bundle_test (9 pass) + gate script. Artifact filenames, bounds, determinism rules, and reproduction checklist all validated.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:37:26.930667114Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:52:42.521959Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:52:42.521959Z","close_reason":"Crash bundle specification operational. 9 harness tests pass. check_crash_bundle.sh validates evidence snapshots, determinism rules, and reproduction checklist.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","critique","diagnostics"]}

 {"id":"bd-73gu","title":"Metamorphic tests for pthread mutex contract state machine","description":"Add metamorphic relation (MR) proptests to frankenlibc-core::pthread::mutex for mutex_contract_transition. Gaps in existing coverage: (1) TryLock.blocks invariant (must always be false), (2) Lock+Unlock roundtrip identity from Unlocked, (3) blocks=>errno=0 implication, (4) N-cycle Lock/Unlock preserves Unlocked state, (5) Destroy from Locked* returns EBUSY preserving state. Scope: crates/frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/mutex.rs #[cfg(test)] module. One MR per commit, each validated against existing passing behavior.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-20T18:03:36.092304396Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T18:11:24.934564282Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T18:11:24.932597224Z","close_reason":"Added 5 independent metamorphic proptests on mutex_contract_transition: (1) prop_trylock_never_blocks (FS×I/C≈20), (2) prop_lock_unlock_roundtrip_is_identity, (3) prop_trylock_unlock_roundtrip_is_identity, (4) prop_blocks_implies_success (structural invariant over full kind×state×op cube), (5) prop_destroyed_absorbs_non_init_ops + prop_uninitialized_absorbs_non_init_ops (trap-state fences). Mutation-validated MR1 by flipping blocks=false→true in LockedBySelf+TryLock+RECURSIVE arm — caught on first run. All 22 pthread::mutex tests pass. Commits: a41297b, 790211a, 0cf160b, e448ca0.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-73r","title":"EPIC: Runtime Hot-Path Perf Gates (strict <20ns, hardened <200ns)","description":"Goal: enforce extreme-software-optimization discipline for runtime_math.

Why:
- runtime_math is on the membrane hot path. Any regression here leaks into every libc call we gate.

Constraints:
- Strict mode must stay <20ns/call overhead target.
- Hardened mode must stay <200ns/call overhead target.
- No behavior regressions without explicit isomorphism proof + fixture evidence.

Outputs:
- Microbench + profile baselines for RuntimeMathKernel::decide + observe_validation_result.
- Golden snapshot outputs to detect accidental semantic drift.
- A repeatable baseline/profile/verify loop that future work MUST follow.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:30:15.483973301Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T01:28:13.676103762Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T01:28:04.198742106Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-1om","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-242","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-38w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-3dv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-d5l","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-pt6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-73r","depends_on_id":"bd-vj3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:32Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1055,"issue_id":"bd-73r","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Epic Notes: Extreme-Optimization Discipline For runtime_math

This epic encodes the non-negotiable loop: **baseline -> profile -> prove -> implement -> verify -> repeat**.

### What We Are Protecting
runtime_math runs at the ABI boundary of libc call paths. Any accidental overhead shows up everywhere.

Budgets (from AGENTS.md):
- strict overhead target: <20ns/call (fast exits)
- hardened overhead target: <200ns/call (bounded heavy path)

### What Counts As “Hot Path”
- `RuntimeMathKernel::decide` on the strict path
- per-call evidence recording (if enabled)
- pointer-validation stage ordering / cached biases

### Hard Rules
- No transcendental math, matrix solves, or heap allocation on strict fast path.
- Any stochastic element must be deterministic from seed (replayable).
- Any “expensive” kernel must be cadence-driven (epoch update) not per call.

### Measurement Artifacts Required
- Criterion microbench for `decide` / `observe` (ns/op + percentiles)
- Profile recipe (flamegraph/perf) pinned to a reproducible command
- Golden snapshot outputs + sha256 regression gate
- Isomorphism proof template for policy changes (behavior invariants)

### Definition Of Done
- We can quantify overhead deltas per kernel addition.
- We can detect regressions in CI before merging.
- We have an explicit narrative for every optimization: what changed, why safe, how measured.","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:52:00Z"},{"id":1056,"issue_id":"bd-73r","author":"CobaltCompass","text":"EPIC CLOSED by CobaltCompass. All 7 sub-beads complete: (1) bd-d5l microbench (BlueLake), (2) bd-vj3 per-kernel bench suite (BrightMoose, verified CobaltCompass), (3) bd-1om golden snapshots (CobaltForge), (4) bd-pt6 profiling recipe (BlueLake), (5) bd-3dv hard rule audit (CobaltCompass - new enforcement script + invariant test), (6) bd-242 regression thresholds (BlueLake), (7) bd-38w isomorphism proof template (BrightMoose). Infrastructure delivered: scripts/hard_rule_audit.sh, scripts/perf_gate.sh, scripts/snapshot_gate.sh, runtime_math_bench + runtime_math_kernels_bench + perf_baseline.json.","created_at":"2026-02-11T01:28:13Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-mjon","title":"bd-yos subtask: Thread bootstrap trampoline finalization for pthread_create","description":"Background:
- Thread bootstrap is a core blocker for both callthrough removal and TLS key APIs.

Goal:
- Finalize clone/trampoline startup path for pthread_create with explicit invariants and ABI boundaries.

Deliverables:
1) Thread start trampoline contract (entry args, return handling, cleanup path).
2) Parent/child synchronization at startup.
3) Error path behavior and errno propagation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- pthread_create success/failure semantics match declared support matrix behavior.
- No hidden host-libc dependency in startup path for covered mode/profile.

Verification & Logging:
- Unit tests for bootstrap components and error branches.
- Structured logs: trace_id, thread_id, parent_id, start_state, exit_state, errno, timing.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonForge","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:00:51.822186049Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T08:55:27.139407950Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T08:55:27.139340033Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","implementation","pthread","testing","threading"],"comments":[{"id":1123,"issue_id":"bd-mjon","author":"CrimsonForge","text":"COMPLETED: Thread bootstrap trampoline implementation.

Files modified:
- crates/frankenlibc-core/src/syscall/raw.rs: Added clone_thread_asm (inline asm trampoline for Linux clone syscall)
- crates/frankenlibc-core/src/syscall/mod.rs: Added SYS_GETTID, SYS_SET_TID_ADDRESS, sys_gettid, sys_exit_thread, sys_clone_thread
- crates/frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/thread.rs: Complete native thread creation via clone (ThreadHandle, create_thread, join_thread, detach_thread, self_tid)
- crates/frankenlibc-core/src/pthread/mod.rs: Updated re-exports

Quality gates:
- cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-core: PASS
- cargo check -p frankenlibc-core --all-targets: PASS
- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-core --all-targets -- -D warnings: PASS
- cargo test -p frankenlibc-core -- pthread::thread: 6/6 PASS

Tests:
- create_and_join_thread_returns_value
- child_thread_can_write_shared_memory
- multiple_threads_created_and_joined
- detach_thread_does_not_error
- join_null_handle_returns_einval
- gettid_returns_positive

Architecture:
- Uses CLONE_VM|CLONE_FS|CLONE_FILES|CLONE_SIGHAND|CLONE_THREAD|CLONE_SYSVSEM|CLONE_SETTLS|CLONE_PARENT_SETTID|CLONE_CHILD_CLEARTID
- Child stack: [fn_ptr][arg] layout, trampoline pops both, calls fn_ptr(arg), SYS_exit on return
- Join uses futex-wait on TID (kernel clears via CLONE_CHILD_CLEARTID and wakes waiters)
- Parent/child sync via startup futex (ensures args consumed before create returns)
- 2MiB stack with 4KiB guard page via mmap","created_at":"2026-02-13T08:55:20Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-qwm","title":"CRT phase-0: _start/__libc_start_main bootstrap skeleton + acceptance fixtures","description":"Critique mapping: #4.

Deliverables:
- Implement minimal startup skeleton for controlled test binaries.
- Capture argv/envp/auxv transfer invariants and security-mode checks.

Acceptance:
- Startup fixtures execute under controlled binaries without glibc bootstrap dependence in covered path.
- Invariant ledger produced for init order and secure-mode decisions.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SwiftLark","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:10.476819415Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T19:27:25.598312486Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T19:27:25.598119230Z","close_reason":"Acceptance fixture now passes under LD_PRELOAD in strict+hardened modes; verification matrix and evidence artifacts refreshed.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","crt","rtld"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-qwm","depends_on_id":"bd-11nb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-qwm","depends_on_id":"bd-1ah8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-qwm","depends_on_id":"bd-320s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-qwm","depends_on_id":"bd-3bvo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1134,"issue_id":"bd-qwm","author":"OrangeGlacier","text":"2026-02-11 initial execution increment (OrangeGlacier): audit + ownership established.

Findings:
- No current `_start` / `__libc_start_main` export exists in `crates/glibc-rs-abi`.
- `crates/glibc-rs-abi/version_scripts/libc.map` currently has no startup symbols.
- No startup-focused acceptance fixture exists in `tests/integration/`.
- `tests/conformance/verification_matrix.json` entry for `bd-qwm` is still auto-backfilled (`missing` unit/log/golden evidence).

Action taken:
- Claimed bead (`status=in_progress`, assignee=OrangeGlacier).
- Reserved initial implementation file scope for startup ABI + fixture path.
- Sent coordination updates in agent mail thread `bd-qwm` to avoid overlap.

Planned implementation increment next:
1. Add phase-0 startup ABI skeleton (`__libc_start_main`) with constrained semantics for controlled fixture binaries.
2. Add deterministic acceptance fixture (`tests/integration/fixture_startup.c`).
3. Wire symbol classification + run relevant gates; record structured artifact refs in this bead.

I just claimed bd-33p.1 (canonical evidence schema v2) and will push updates there; ping me here if you need anything or see conflicts.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:12:48Z"},{"id":1264,"issue_id":"bd-qwm","author":"SwiftLark","text":"Progress update (SwiftLark, 2026-03-04): started bd-qwm closure pass after bd-1ah8 unblocked this parent bead.

What I validated:
1) Startup ABI contract suite (offloaded via rch)
- Command: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test startup_abi_contract_test -- --nocapture
- Result: PASS (11/11)
- Confirms phase-0 skeleton/invariant behavior for __libc_start_main / __frankenlibc_startup_phase0 / __frankenlibc_startup_snapshot.

2) Controlled fixture evidence path
- Compiled tests/integration/fixture_startup.c into tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260304T024556Z/fixture_startup
- Ran strict+hardened with FRANKENLIBC_STARTUP_PHASE0=1 and LD_PRELOAD=target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so (timeout 6)
- Observed outcome: both modes timed out (exit=124), captured in deterministic artifacts.

Artifacts produced/updated:
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/trace.jsonl
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/artifact_index.json
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260304T024556Z/{strict,hardened}.{stdout,stderr}.txt

Evidence registry alignment:
- Updated tests/conformance/verification_matrix.json qwm row from auto-backfilled missing -> partial:
  - unit_tests: complete
  - structured_logs: partial
  - golden_artifacts: partial
  - close_blockers: [startup_fixture_ld_preload_timeout]

Current blocker for full bd-qwm closure:
- startup fixture binary still hangs under LD_PRELOAD in strict/hardened mode (timeout). Unit-level startup ABI contract is green, but full fixture execution acceptance under preload remains unresolved.

Recommended next step:
- Isolate startup fixture hang path (likely startup interpose recursion/loader path) and land targeted fix before closing bd-qwm.","created_at":"2026-03-04T02:47:47Z"},{"id":1406,"issue_id":"bd-qwm","author":"GoldenLotus","text":"2026-04-07 closure pass (GoldenLotus): resolved the remaining acceptance blocker for bd-qwm. Root cause was twofold: (1) phase-0 startup tracing was missing several checkpoint pushes in startup_abi, and (2) the controlled C fixture was not honoring the phase-0 argv/envp contract, so the synthetic env vector was derived from an invalid stack layout under LD_PRELOAD. I also added a bootstrap-sensitive getenv fast path to avoid reentering membrane/runtime-policy orchestration while the validation pipeline is still initializing, plus a startup contract regression test that writes through stdio during phase-0 main.\n\nFiles updated:\n- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/startup_abi.rs\n- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/stdlib_abi.rs\n- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/membrane_state.rs\n- crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/startup_abi_contract_test.rs\n- tests/integration/fixture_startup.c\n- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/{trace.jsonl,artifact_index.json}\n- tests/conformance/verification_matrix.json\n\nVerification:\n- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-abi -> PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets -> PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings -> PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo build -p frankenlibc-abi --release -> PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test startup_abi_contract_test -- --nocapture -> PASS (12/12)\n- cc -std=c11 -O2 tests/integration/fixture_startup.c -o tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260407T192033Z/fixture_startup -> PASS\n- timeout 6 env FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict FRANKENLIBC_STARTUP_PHASE0=1 LD_PRELOAD=target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260407T192033Z/fixture_startup -> PASS\n- timeout 6 env FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened FRANKENLIBC_STARTUP_PHASE0=1 LD_PRELOAD=target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260407T192033Z/fixture_startup -> PASS\n\nEvidence refreshed:\n- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/raw/20260407T192033Z/*\n- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/trace.jsonl\n- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-qwm/artifact_index.json\n- tests/conformance/verification_matrix.json","created_at":"2026-04-07T19:27:21Z"}]}
